# Pubky Documentation

> Pubky is an open protocol for key-based, censorship-resistant web applications. It provides identity via public keys, data storage on homeservers, and discovery via the Mainline DHT — all over simple HTTP/REST APIs.

## Quick Start

- [TL;DR](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/tldr/): 30-second overview of the Pubky decentralized web protocol
- [Getting Started](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/getting-started/): Complete guide for users and developers to start with Pubky
- [Overview](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/overview/): Welcome to the Pubky Knowledge Base
- [Glossary](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/glossary/): Quick reference for terms used throughout the Pubky ecosystem
- [FAQ](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/faq/): Frequently asked questions about Pubky Core
- [The Vision of Pubky](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/the-vision-of-pubky/): Decentralizing our future — the motivation behind Pubky
- [Architecture](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/architecture/): Comprehensive overview of the Pubky ecosystem architecture
- [Comparisons](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/comparisons/): How Pubky differs from other decentralized and federated protocols

## Key Concepts

- [Censorship](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/censorship/): Why centralized platforms fail and how Pubky enables censorship resistance
- [Credible Exit](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/credible-exit/): Ability to leave a platform without losing data, identity, or connections
- [Semantic Social Graph](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/semantic-social-graph/): Tagged relationships and user-controlled filtering for personalized feeds

## Pubky Core

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/introduction/): Open protocol for per-public-key backends for censorship-resistant web applications
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/eli5/): Explaining Pubky Core like you're 5 years old
- [API Reference](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/api/): RESTful HTTP API specification for storing and retrieving data on Homeservers
- [SDK](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/sdk/): Client libraries for building applications on Pubky Core across multiple languages
- [Homeserver](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/homeserver/): Independent data stores enabling censorship resistance and data portability
- [Authentication](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/authentication/): Decentralized authentication where users control their own cryptographic keys
- [Security Model](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/security-model/): Security model, threat landscape, and trust assumptions in Pubky Core

## PKARR

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/introduction/): Public-Key Addressable Resource Records for decentralized identity
- [Architecture](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/architecture/): In-depth look at PKARR components, data formats, and interactions
- [Why PKARR?](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/why-pkarr/): Motivation behind PKARR addressing distributed semantics, databases, and discovery
- [Getting Started](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/getting-started/): Guide to publishing and resolving resource records using PKARR
- [Expectations](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/expectations/): Understanding the expectations and limitations of PKARR
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/eli5/): Simple explanation of PKARR with Mainline DHT

## Pubky Apps

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/introduction/): Overview of the Pubky social application layer
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/eli5/): Simple explanation of Pubky App
- [App Specs](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-specs/): Shared data model specifications for the Pubky social app ecosystem

## App Architectures

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/introduction/): Overview of application architecture patterns built on Pubky Core
- [Client-Homeserver](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/client-homeserver/): Simple direct connection between client application and a single Homeserver
- [Global Aggregators](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/global-aggregators/): Multiple Homeservers feeding data into a central aggregator service
- [Custom Backend](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/custom-backend/): Advanced architecture with custom aggregation, inference, and specialized APIs

## Indexing and Aggregation

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/introduction/): Backend responsible for collecting and organizing data from Homeservers
- [Aggregator](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/aggregator/): Specialized reducers that scan and collect data from Homeservers
- [Indexer](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/indexer/): Normalizes and transforms aggregated data into a unified searchable view
- [Pubky Nexus](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/pubky-nexus/): Production-grade indexing and aggregation service powering social features
- [Web Server](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/web-server/): Backend services for data feeds, search, and UI configurations

## Reference App

- [Pubky Client](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/introduction/): User-facing progressive web app for the Pubky social network
- [pubky.app](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/pubky-app/): Web portal — a publisher and social feed for the decentralized web
- [Bookmarks](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/bookmarks/): Privately save posts for later reference
- [Layouts](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/layouts/): Multiple customizable UI layouts for column, grid, and list feeds
- [Notifications](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/notifications/): Event tracking and activity alerts for user interactions
- [Perspectives](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/perspectives/): Custom-filtered views with saved tags, weights, users, and layout settings
- [Posts](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/posts/): Core content published by users on the platform
- [Profiles](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/profiles/): User personal pages representing a public key identity
- [Search](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/search/): Traditional search capabilities complementing tags and filters
- [Tags](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/tags/): Free-text labels powering the Semantic Social Graph for discovery and filtering
- [Trends](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/trends/): Statistical views and leaderboards of trending posts, tags, and users

## Technologies

- [Key Pairs](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/key-pair/): Cryptographic key pairs for identity and signing in Pubky
- [Mainline DHT](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/mainline-dht/): Distributed Hash Table used in BitTorrent with 10M+ nodes for decentralized discovery
- [DHT](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/dht/): Decentralized key-value store for efficient distributed data retrieval
- [DNS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/dns/): Domain Name System translating human-readable names to IP addresses
- [DNS over HTTPS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/doh/): Security protocol encrypting DNS queries to prevent eavesdropping
- [HTTPS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/https/): HTTP extension encrypting communication using TLS
- [HTTP Relay](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/http-relay/): Relay service for forwarding encrypted AuthTokens during authentication flows
- [PKDNS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pkdns/): DNS server resolving PKARR public-key domains via Mainline DHT
- [Pubky Ring](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-ring/): Mobile identity manager for key management and app authorization
- [Homegate](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/homegate/): Homeserver signup gatekeeping via SMS and Lightning payment verification
- [Pubky CLI](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-cli/): Command-line tool for interacting with Pubky Homeservers
- [Pubky Docker](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-docker/): Docker Compose orchestration for a full local Pubky development environment
- [Pubky Explorer](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-explorer/): Web-based file browser for exploring public data on Homeservers
- [Pubky Backup](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-backup/): Desktop backup application for maintaining local copies of published data
- [Pubky Moderation](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-moderation/): Content moderation service protecting homeserver operators and users
- [Pubky Noise](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-noise/): Encrypted communication protocol (work in progress)
- [Paykit](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/paykit/): Decentralized payment protocol (work in progress)
- [Jeb](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/jeb-pubky-ai-bot/): AI-powered bot for intelligent summaries and fact-checking on Pubky

## Community

- [Contributing](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/contributing/): Guide to contributing to Pubky
- [Troubleshooting](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/troubleshooting/): Common issues and solutions when working with Pubky
